case_title: YUCH MEI WEI VS. SUDHEER SWAMY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,589.31 FILED BY WEI, YUCH MEI AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEI, YUCH MEI AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
